titleStmt.title: SII 9.336: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 336. (A.R. No. 52 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE BOLU-BASAVA TEMPLE AT KUDATINI, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1140, Bahudhānya, Kārtika, puṇṇami, Bṛihaspativāra, Sōmagrahaṇa. In Bahudhānya = Śaka 1140 (expired) Kārttika śu. 15 corresponded to A.D. 1218 November 4, Sunday (not Thursday); but in the next year i.e., Pramāthi, Kārtika Puṇṇame did fall on Thursday = 24 October A.D. 1219. Even on that day there was no eclipse. The record belongs to the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Ballāḷa (II). When Udayākaradēva-Brahmachāriyarasa, the five vargas of the sthāna of Koṭṭitoṇe, the ascetics of the five maṭhas and numberless gaṇas had assembled, the sixty families of the oil-makers set up the god Telligēśvara and made a gift of the cess levied on every sale and purchase, for the service of the god. The gift was made after washing the feet of Kalyāṇaśakti, a Śaiva teacher in charge of the institution.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayābhyudayaśca . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbica
ṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūla
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . namaḥ svāmikumārāya dṛpyattā
rakavidviṣē Adhaṣkṛtamayūrāya bāṇādyadhikaśaktayē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhi
rāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ yādavakuḷāṁbara
dyumaṇi sa(ṁ)myaktacūḍāmaṇi malerājarāja malaparoḷugaṇḍaka
danapracaṇḍa sanivārasiddhi giridurgamalla nissaṁkapratāpa hoysa
ṇarāya vīraballāḷadēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivri
dhdhipravardhdhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salalu dōrasamudra
da nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda bratajapaniyamahōma
saṁyuktaruṁ śrīsvāmikārtikēyadēvatapōvanādhipatigaḷmappa
śrīmaddaṁḍāsani lōhāsani Udeyākaradēvabrahma
cāriyarasaru mukhyavāgi koṭṭitoṇeya sthānadayduṁ
varggaṁgaḷuṁ . paṁcamaṭhasthānada tapōdhanaruṁ . Asaṁ
khyātagaṇagaḷuṁ mahāsabheyāgi neradalli brahmacāriyarasara
sthānadaydhuvarggaṁgaḷa kayyalu gāṇadaṟuvattokkalugaḷellaruṁ ne
radu yajamānaralu dharmmava māḍalanujñeyaṁ paḍadu
śrītelligēśvaradēvaraṁ śubhadinamuhūrttadalu I pratiṣṭhaya māḍi
dēvaraṁgabhōgakhaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōdhdhāranaṁdādīvigege salvaṁtāgi
śakavarṣa 1140 neya bahudhā(ṁ)nyasaṁvatsarada kārttikada pu
ṇnami bṛhaspativāra sōmagrahaṇadalu kalyāṇaśaktiguru
gaḷa pādaprakṣāḷanaṁ māḍi dhārāpūrbbakamāgi Ācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁbaraṁ naḍevaṁtāgi koṭṭāya telligaru Eḷḷa māṟakoṁḍava
gu hoṁge kaṭṭidalagina cikkatārava teṟuvaru beḷiya tāradarddhada .
Eṇneyanu gāṇakke niccalu Arddhasolligeyanu Āḍitakke Eṟevaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.336 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
